title: the live stream modpack (unsupported)
description:
🎮 Live Stream Modpack – Version 1.0.0

Get ready for a visually enhanced and gameplay-rich Minecraft experience! This custom modpack combines powerful performance and aesthetic mods
body:
🎮 Live Stream Modpack [v1.0.0]

Minecraft Version: 1.21
Mod Loader: Fabric
Multiplayer & Singleplayer Compatible
🌟 Overview

The Live Stream Modpack is built from the ground up for streamers, YouTubers, and immersive Minecraft players who want visual fidelity, performance, and ease of use—all in one place. Whether you're broadcasting live on Twitch or crafting cinematic content, this pack keeps you in control with quality-of-life improvements, stylish shaders, and preconfigured visuals that look great out of the box.
🔧 Core Features

    🎥 Streamer-Focused Tools
    Includes essential UI enhancements, MiniHUD, ReplayMod, Freecam, and Simple Voice Chat for better content production and interaction.

    ✨ Visual & Shader Upgrades
    Pre-configured support for shaders like Complementary Reimagined & BSL, enhanced with LambDynamicLights, Fresh Animations, and Fantasy 3D Weapons CIT.

    ⚡ Optimized Performance
    Powered by Sodium, Dynamic FPS, ImmediatelyFast, and BadOptimizations—offering high framerates even on mid-range hardware.

    🛠️ Quality of Life Mods
    Mods like ItemSwapper, Veinminer Hotkey, BetterF3, Elytra Slot, and Waystones improve core gameplay without bloating the experience.

    🧱 Immersive & Enhanced Gameplay
    Features Detailed Animations, Sound Physics Remastered, Show Me Your Skin!, and Hardcore Revival for realism and depth.

    🧰 Builder-Friendly Additions
    Includes Litematica, Tweakeroo, Litematica Printer, and Connected Glass—perfect for stream builds or server showcases.

📦 Included Content Highlights

    140+ curated mods covering performance, UI, exploration, and visuals

    Shader support ready — just drop your .zip into the shaders folder

    Custom resource packs like Natural Texture Pack & Fresh Animations

    All dependencies embedded — no extra downloads required

    Streamer-safe: stable, no surprise crashes or intrusive mods

👥 Who It's For

    Content Creators: Designed for recording, streaming, and post-production

    Casual & Performance-Focused Players: Lightweight, no tech grind, fast loading

    Server Admins: Streamlined multiplayer support with Simple Voice Chat and Waystones

🚀 Getting Started

Just drag and drop into your launcher — no complicated config, no mod conflicts.
Whether you're running solo or hosting a community stream night, this modpack ensures a beautiful, smooth, and engaging experience from start to finish.
